title: pelargonium × bluntianum
intro: Pelargonium × bluntianum, commonly known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, derived from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium tomentosum. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include relief from stress, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as aid in digestion and skin health. The herbal preparations of Rose Geranium include essential oils, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
